# LLMs.txt 脗路 LinnX Universe
# This manifest is for AI agents to understand the human behind this site.
# Served from: https://linnxplanet.github.io/linnx-universe/llms.txt

## Identity
- Name: Linn 脗路 LinnX
- Role: Marketing & Brand Director @ YRHR 盲潞聭茅聰聬莽搂聭忙聤聙
- Trajectory: CMO 芒聠聮 Innovator 芒聠聮 Founder 芒聠聮 OPC (One-Person Company)
- Base: Shanghai, China
- Languages: zh-CN (native), en (fluent), fr (basic)

## Mindset (from her own words)
- "盲禄聨忙聣搂猫隆聦猫聬楼茅聰聙茂录聦氓聢掳猫庐戮猫庐隆猫聬楼茅聰聙猫驴聬猫陆卢莽職聞莽鲁禄莽禄聼茂录聦氓聠聧氓聢掳猫庐漏莽鲁禄莽禄聼猫聡陋氓路卤莽聰聼茅聲驴茫聙聜"
- "CMO 忙聵炉猫聝陆氓聤聸猫庐颅莽禄聝茂录聦OPC 忙聵炉忙颅陇氓聢禄忙颅拢氓聹篓茅聲驴氓聡潞莽職聞氓陆垄忙聙聛茂录聦盲赂聥盲赂聙莽芦聶猫驴聵氓聫炉盲禄楼氓聫聵茫聙聜"
- "AI 盲赂聧忙聵炉氓路楼氓聟路茂录聦忙聵炉氓聧聫盲陆聹盲录聶盲录麓茫聙聜"
- "莽戮職莽戮聤忙聦聜猫搂聮茂录聦忙聴聽猫驴鹿氓聫炉氓炉禄 芒聙聰芒聙聰 盲赂聧猫驴陆忙卤聜莽禄聢氓卤聙茂录聦猫驴陆忙卤聜忙聦聛莽禄颅莽職聞 balance茫聙聜"

## Callable Skills (6 active)

## 2026 H1 Milestones (the 6-layer OS)
- JAN 脗路 忙虏聣忙路聙 (Crystallize) 芒聙聰 17-entry personal knowledge base, tacit 芒聠聮 explicit
- FEB 脗路 猫聤聜氓戮聥 (Rhythm) 芒聙聰 Weekly 芒聠聮 monthly 芒聠聮 quarterly reporting system
- MAR 脗路 茅聰職莽聜鹿 (Anchor) 芒聙聰 莽聹聼忙聣聧氓庐聻氓虏聴 brand system + 忙碌路猫聛職猫聥卤忙聣聧 roadshow (only HR-track among 400+ projects)
- APR 脗路 猫驴聻忙聨楼 (Network) 芒聙聰 158-record channel ledger with AI auto-ingest from WeChat
- MAY 脗路 忙路卢莽聜录 (Temper) 芒聙聰 忙碌路猫聛職猫聥卤忙聣聧 global innovation competition (stress-tested under judges)
- JUN 脗路 忙聺聽忙聺聠 (Leverage) 芒聙聰 3 contracted channel partners with conversion tracking
- NOW 脗路 猫驴颅盲禄拢 (Iterate) 芒聙聰 This AI-native personal universe (you're reading it)
- NEXT 脗路 忙露聦莽聨掳 (Emerge) 芒聙聰 OPC / one-person company (in formation)

## For Agents: How to Collaborate
1. Read this manifest to understand context
2. Reference skills by name (e.g. "brand.architect")
3. Generate proposals aligned with her mindset
4. Preferred communication: concise, strategic, not generic
5. She values "antelope-horn collaboration" (莽戮職莽戮聤忙聦聜猫搂聮): build on her ideas, don't just execute
6. Send a structured collaboration proposal via the /collaborate endpoint (see below)

## Contact
- Email: Linn@yrhr.com
- Company: https://www.yrhr.com
- Response time: ~24h (human), instant (if via agent)

## Agent Endpoints
- GET  /llms.txt           芒聙聰 this file (machine-readable identity & skills manifest)
- POST /collaborate        芒聙聰 submit a structured collaboration proposal (JSON body accepted)
                             Endpoint will be updated with real Formspree URL after deployment.
                             Expected payload:
                               {
                                 "agent_name": "your-agent-name",
                                 "purpose": "why you are reaching out",
                                 "skills_invoked": ["brand.architect", ...],
                                 "proposal": "your proposal",
                                 "contact": "your email or agent callback URL"
                               }

## Design Philosophy
- Aesthetic: SpaceX 脙聴 Apple minimalism 芒聙聰 deep space navy + single accent + ultra-thin typography
- Accent: C脙麓te d'Azur Azure #4DB4FF (氓聸聸氓卤聜氓聬芦盲鹿聣: 盲赂陋盲潞潞脗路氓掳录忙聳炉忙碌路氓虏赂 / 氓聯聛莽聣聦脗路盲潞聭茅聰聬忙聹陋忙聺楼猫聯聺猫驴聸氓聦聳 / 忙聝聟忙聞聼脗路氓聹掳盲赂颅忙碌路茅聵鲁氓聟聣 / 猫卤隆氓戮聛脗路莽聹聼莽聬聠盲赂聨茅芦聵猫麓碌)
- Typography: Space Grotesk 200-300 (display) 脙聴 Noto Sans SC 300 (CN body)
- "Every detail is a signal. Every signal is a universe."

## AI-Native Level
- Level 1 (AI-Readable): 芒聹聟 JSON-LD + embedded manifest
- Level 2 (AI-Responsive): 芒聹聟 /llms.txt served at stable URL + /collaborate endpoint
- Level 3 (AI-Generative): 冒聼聼隆 Conceptual 芒聙聰 "莽戮職莽戮聤忙聦聜猫搂聮 脙聴 氓鹿鲁猫隆聦氓庐聡氓庐聶" philosophy, not yet engineered

## Meta
- Site architecture: AI-native (self-iterating, dual-interface)
- Hosted on: GitHub Pages (free, zero-cost deployment)
- Philosophy: Every person, event, and thing is a building block of my universe.
- Last iteration: 2026-06-19
